rows.label: qev070306_MSG0002
rows.name:
Even among the elites of the
distant future, there isn't
a soldier quite like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070306_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Alright! Repairs on my end are done
too. Then, let's hurry back to NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070306_MSG0004
rows.name:
I must quickly develop new products
and rake in the cash. Past, future,
or present, time is money![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070306_MSG0005
rows.name:
Then... Let's go! Take
flight! Mirariaaaaaaaan!![ST:wait ]
